concerns.text: T028 implements 'paired Wilcoxon signed-rank test for pass@1 scores' but plan.md FR-005 coverage matrix specifies McNemar's test for binary pass@1 data. Wilcoxon is inappropriate for binary outcomes; this weakens the plan's statistical methodology.

T036 places power/sample-size justification implementation in code/analyze.py but plan.md FR/SC Coverage Matrix explicitly assigns FR-010 to Phase 0 research.md document. This violates the plan's phase discipline for research documentation.

T030 implements Bonferroni correction for 'two hypotheses' but plan.md FR-005 coverage matrix explicitly states 'Bonferroni correction for 3 hypotheses'. This silently relaxes the plan's multiplicity correction requirement.

T031 implements Cohen's d effect size but plan.md Technical Context specifies Wilcoxon tests which should use rank-biserial correlation (non-parametric). Cohen's d is parametric and inappropriate for Wilcoxon, weakening statistical validity.

T013 and T014 implement FR-007 and FR-008 logging but do not include verification that parse_failures.log and flagged_snippets.csv contain all required fields (problem_id, error_type, timestamp/stack_trace/code_diff). Acceptance criteria from spec.md are not fully preserved in task verification steps.

T023 implements metrics CSV writer but does not explicitly verify that metrics_raw.csv and metrics_simplified.csv contain all required columns (problem_id, pass@1, token_count, inference_time_ms) as specified in spec.md FR-004 and US-2 acceptance scenarios.
